summary: Build the initial framework of a software package from literature via a 7-phase pipeline (survey, extraction, skeleton, reimplementation, reference-check, composite-gates, closeout), each closed by a fail-closed gate; adds the literature-to-code bridge (span-anchored extraction, traceability ledger, clean-room reimplementation, reference-value cross-validation).

install.claude_code: Link into ~/.claude/skills or install via marketplace when available.
install.codex: Link into ~/.codex/skills for Codex native discovery.
install.kimi_code: Link into ~/.kimi-code/skills for Kimi Code discovery.
